annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest under A.R.S. §44-1201(B): the lesser of 10% per annum or the Federal Reserve prime rate (Fed H.15) + 1 percentage point — currently 7.75% (prime ~6.75% + 1). Simple interest. A written agreement may set a different rate. Verify against the current prime rate; not legal advice.
